zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Rhys Griffith I於1288年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor33歲，母親Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym14歲。他於1325年與Joan de Somerville在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年5月10日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Rhys Griffith I于1288年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor33岁，母亲Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym14岁。他于1325年与Joan de Somerville在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年5月10日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Rhys Griffith I was born in 1288, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor, was 33 and his mother, Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, was 14. He married Joan de Somerville in 1325, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 May 1356, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Rhys Griffith I est né en 1288, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Somerville en 1325, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1356, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Rhys Griffith I 1288 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor 33 und seine Mutter Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym 14. Er hat 1325 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Joan de Somerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1356 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Rhys Griffith I è nato il nel 1288 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Somerville nel 1325, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1356, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Rhys Griffith Iが1288年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudorは33歳，母Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilymは14歳であった。1325年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでJoan de Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年5月10日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Rhys Griffith I(이)가 1288년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1325년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Joan de Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 5월 10일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Rhys Griffith I nasceu em 1288, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Somerville em 1325, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1356, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Rhys Griffith I родился в 1288 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Somerville в 1325 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 мая 1356 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Rhys Griffith I nació en 1288, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd ap Hywel Tudor, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Nest Fechan ferch Gwrwrad ap Gwilym, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Joan de Somerville en 1325, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1356, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
